---
title: "Exploring Storms"
author: "krrishjayakumar"
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

# Storms Analysis

The `storms` dataset in `dplyr` tracks Atlantic basin tropical cyclones. Below is the count of unique named storms per year.

```{r}
#| label: named-storms-plot
#| fig-cap: "Number of tropical depressions, tropical storms, and hurricanes per year in the Atlantic basin."
storms %>%
  filter(status %in% c("tropical depression", "tropical storm", "hurricane")) %>%
  distinct(year, status, name) %>%
  count(year, status) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n, fill = status)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("tropical depression" = "lightblue",
                               "tropical storm" = "orange",
                               "hurricane" = "darkred")) +
  labs(
    title = "Annual Frequency of Storm Types",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of Unique Storms",
    fill = "Storm Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
